_comment: slack-reactor app, Socket Mode + bot events. Add this to the existing 'mukuls_bot' app (api.slack.com/apps → that app) rather than creating a new one, so its bot token stays the one in $SLACK_BOT_TOKEN. Socket Mode delivers BOT events, so the bot only receives reaction_added in channels it has been /invite-d to. Per-machine routing is by $TODO_EMOJI (and/or one app per machine).

display_information.name: mukuls_bot
display_information.description: React an emoji on a thread to capture it as a /todo
